fact_nuggets.text: If you were looking for the move called Toxic Chain in Japanese, see Malignant Chain (move). Toxic Chain (Japanese: Toxic Chain) is an Ability introduced during Generation IX, in The Teal Mask. It is the signature Ability of the Loyal Three.
Signature Ability of The Loyal Three

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] If a Pokemon with this Ability uses a non- status move , there is a 30% chance the target will become badly poisoned . Toxic Chain's chances also apply independently for each hit of a multistrike move . If this Ability triggers when using the move Knock Off on a target with a Lum or Pecha Berry , the Berry will be consumed to cure the poisoning instead of being removed by Knock Off's effect. [ 1 ] Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Toxic Chain has no effect outside of battle. https://twitter.com/Theorymon/status/1703176996577321419

May cause bad poisoning when the Pokemon hits an opponent with a move.
